meaning: adj.多国的,跨国公司的,多民族的n.多国籍公司,跨国公司
examples: The company eventually sold out to a multinational media group.
The company is a wholly-owned subsidiary of a large multinational.
In the mass production era, multinational firms tended to centralize their operations.
Haier is a Chinese multinational consumer electronics and home appliances company headquartered in Qingdao, Shandong, China.
Corporate tax on foreign multinational companies investing in Ireland was cut to zero in 1957.
